message:
bench(cap): add cap enforcement benchmarks for dedup, rate tracker, ring buffer [ft-3kxe.6]

Benchmarks EventDeduplicator LRU eviction at caps 100/500/2000,
RateLimitTracker pane churn beyond 256 cap, and RingBuffer churn at
64/256/1024. All 7 cases pass in test mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
